title: SAF One Acquires Green Biotrade to Bolster Feedstock Supply Chain
content: SAF One, a platform focused on the development of global sustainable aviation fuel solutions, today announced the acquisition of Green Biotrade, a UAE based feedstock and biofuels trading company. This strategic acquisition will strengthen SAF One's supply chain capabilities and secure critical feedstock for its sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) projects.
author: Analysts Account
